auric champions.name: EARNING OF A NAME
auric champions.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time a CHARACTER model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can...

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: Up to two Adeptus Custodes Character units from your army that have not been selected to fight this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time a CHARACTER model in either of your units makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

auric champions.name: SHOULDER THE MANTLE

details.label: When
details.text: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that is not leading a unit.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Select one friendly unit (excluding Battle-shocked and Attached units) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your model that it could lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your model attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit's Starting Strength accordingly.

auric champions.name: SLAYER OF CHAMPIONS

details.label: Target
details.text: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that has just destroyed the unit you selected at the start of your Command phase as the target of your Assemblage of Might ability.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Select one enemy unit on the battlefield Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an ADEPTUS CUSTODES CHARACTER model from your army makes an attack that target that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll In addition, if the destroyed unit was a CHARACTER unit, gain 1CP.

auric champions.name: THE EMPEROR'S AUSPICE

details.label: Target
details.text: One Adeptus Custodes Character unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, CHARACTER models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

auric champions.name: SUPERHUMAN RESERVES
auric champions.summary: Your model can use its Once per battle' ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).

details.label: When
details.text: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Warlord model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet or from an Enhancement that says it can only be used Once per battle.

details.label: Target
details.text: That Adeptus Custodes Warlord model.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Your model can use its Once per battle' ability one additional time during this battle (but not in the same phase).

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

auric champions.name: VIGIL UNENDING
auric champions.summary: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army that was just destroyed and has not fought this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Do not remove your destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

lions of the emperor.name: DEFIANT TO THE LAST
lions of the emperor.type: Lions of the Emperor - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
lions of the emperor.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the CHARA...

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

details.label: Target
details.text: One ADEPTUS CUSTODES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the CHARACTER keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

If your unit has the JUMP PACK keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

hallowed martyrs.name: DIVINE INTERVENTION
hallowed martyrs.summary: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed...

details.label: When
details.text: Any phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Adepta Sororitas Character unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

details.label: Effect
details.text: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model is set back up with that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds).

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: You cannot select Saint Celestine as the target of this Stratagem. You cannot select the same CHARACTER as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle.

Example: If you roll a 2 and choose to spend one Flux token to re-roll the result, and the re-roll is a 6, then until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, on an unmodified Hit roll of 6 the attack sequence ends, that attack fails to hit and no Critical Hit effects (e.g. Lethal Hits) are resolved.

When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

saga of the beastslayer.name: IMPETUOSITY

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, after that enemy unit has shot, if one or more models in your unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, your unit can make an Impetuous move. To do so, roll one D6: your unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

details.label: Restrictions

details.label: Restrictions

While a unit is malevolent, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

details.label: Restrictions

goretrack onslaught.name: SMASH THROUGH
goretrack onslaught.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

details.label: When
details.text: Your Movement phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Vehicle model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

goretrack onslaught.name: UNRELENTING ADVANCE
goretrack onslaught.summary: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Vehicle model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Fury Unleashed Stratagem in the same phase.

khorne daemonkin.name: A WORTHY SKULL
khorne daemonkin.summary: You gain D3BTP and you can then spend one or more BTP you have to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase, just after a Blood Legions or World Eaters unit from your army has fought, and one or more enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks.

details.label: Target
details.text: That BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit.

details.label: Effect
details.text: You gain D3BTP and you can then spend one or more BTP you have to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

khorne daemonkin.name: BLESSING OF BURNING BLOOD
khorne daemonkin.summary: Until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If the Boon of Blood ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase,...

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Blood Legions unit from your army that is within 6" of a friendly World Eaters unit that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If the Boon of Blood ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

khorne daemonkin.name: DAEMONIC FURY
khorne daemonkin.summary: Select one friendly World Eaters unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your WORLD EATERS unit have the [LANCE] ability. If...

details.label: When
details.text: Start of your Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Blood Legions unit from your army.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Select one friendly World Eaters unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your WORLD EATERS unit have the [LANCE] ability. If the Daemonic Rage ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase those melee weapons also have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

khorne daemonkin.name: DAEMONTIDE
khorne daemonkin.summary: Select one friendly Blood Legions unit within 6" of your unit. One destroyed Mounted model, up to D3 destroyed Beast models, or up to D6 destroyed Infantry models are returned t...

details.label: When
details.text: Your Command phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters unit from your army.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Select one friendly Blood Legions unit within 6" of your unit. One destroyed Mounted model, up to D3 destroyed Beast models, or up to D6 destroyed Infantry models are returned to that BLOOD LEGIONS unit with their full wounds remaining.

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed Character models to Attached units.

khorne daemonkin.name: MURDER-CALL
khorne daemonkin.summary: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

details.label: When
details.text: End of your opponent's Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Blood Legions unit from your army that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

khorne daemonkin.name: SUMMONED BY SLAUGHTER
khorne daemonkin.summary: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model fr...

details.label: When
details.text: Any phase, when the last model in a unit is destroyed, before removing it from play. (If that unit is a Transport, any units embarked within that TRANSPORT model must disembark first.)

details.label: Target
details.text: One Bloodletters unit from your army that is in Reserves.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model from play.

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

possessed slaughterband.name: DAEMONIC STRENGTH
possessed slaughterband.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the Eightbound keyword and that enemy model is not...

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Possessed unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the Eightbound keyword and that enemy model is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the Exalted Eightbound keyword and that enemy model is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

possessed slaughterband.name: HORRIFYING VIOLENCE
possessed slaughterband.summary: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Command phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Possessed unit from your army.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

possessed slaughterband.name: RAPID MANIFESTATION
possessed slaughterband.summary: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

details.label: When
details.text: Your Movement phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Exalted Eightbound unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

details.label: Restrictions
details.text: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

possessed slaughterband.name: WARP STALKERS
possessed slaughterband.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES)....

details.label: When
details.text: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Possessed unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless that move was a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

possessed slaughterband.name: DAEMONIC RESISTANCE
possessed slaughterband.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Possessed unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

possessed slaughterband.name: IMMORTAL FURY
possessed slaughterband.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after...

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Possessed unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

vessels of wrath.name: ASPIRE TO INFAMY
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Battle Tactic Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by non-CHARACTER models in your unit by 1.

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One Khorne Berzerkers or Jakhals unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within 8" of one or more friendly World Eaters Character models.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by non-CHARACTER models in your unit by 1.

vessels of wrath.name: BRAZEN CONTEMPT
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Battle Tactic Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtr...

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

details.label: Target
details.text: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll, or, if it is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll instead.

vessels of wrath.name: GORY DEDICATION
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that obje...

details.label: When
details.text: End of the Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy models with a melee attack this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

vessels of wrath.name: MEET FORCE WITH FORCE
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: Your unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible...

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Infantry, World Eaters Mounted or World Eaters Daemon Prince unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Your unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit is a Khorne Berzerkers or VESSEL OF WRATH unit, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

vessels of wrath.name: OVERSHADOWED BY NONE
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Battle Tactic Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

details.label: When
details.text: Fight phase.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Infantry, World Eaters Mounted or World Eaters Daemon Prince unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

details.label: Effect
details.text: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

vessels of wrath.name: PUNISH THE CRAVEN
vessels of wrath.type: Vessels of Wrath - Strategic Ploy Stratagem
vessels of wrath.summary: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if your unit is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from each of...

details.label: When
details.text: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.

details.label: Target
details.text: One World Eaters Infantry or World Eaters Daemon Prince unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

details.label: Effect
details.text: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if your unit is a VESSEL OF WRATH unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
